title: codereview-P3-pass1: duplicate parsing logic across parse_*_logs
description: P3: parse_python_logs, parse_rust_logs, parse_zephyr_logs have nearly identical fallback TX/RX regex and summary parsing (lines 94-114, 138-158, 182-196). Violates DRY. Extract to shared parse_fallback_lines(lines, stats). Also parse_telemetry duplicated in 3 places. After fix, verify with large test that memory stays O(line size). File as codereview.
